zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Marigny於大約1135年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布馬利勒-a特爾時，她的父親Guillaume de Marigny II31歲，母親Adelis34歲。她和Garnier II de Trainel至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1175年之後在法國哈帕格特拉i爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Marigny于大约1135年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布馬利勒-a特爾时，她的父亲Guillaume de Marigny II31岁，母亲Adelis34岁。她和Garnier II de Trainel至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1175年之后在法国哈帕格特拉i爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Marigny was born about 1135, in Marigny-le-Châtel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Guillaume de Marigny II, was 31 and her mother, Adelis, was 34. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Garnier II de Trainel. She died after 1175, in Traînel, Champagne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Marigny est née environ 1135, à Marigny-le-Châtel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guillaume de Marigny II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelis, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Garnier II de Trainel. Elle est décédée après 1175, à Traînel, Champagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Marigny um 1135 in Marigny-le-Châtel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Marigny II 31 und ihre Mutter Adelis 34. Sie hatte mit Garnier II de Trainel mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1175 in Traînel, Champagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Marigny è nata il circa 1135 nel Marigny-le-Châtel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Marigny II, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Adelis, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Garnier II de Trainel. Morì dopo il 1175, nel Traînel, Champagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Marignyが約1135年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベマリグニー-レ-チaテルで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Marigny IIは31歳，母Adelisは34歳であった。彼女はGarnier II de Trainelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1175年以後にフランスチャンプアグントラiネルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Marigny(이)가 대략 1135년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 마익니-레-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Marigny II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelis(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Garnier II de Trainel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 이후 프랑스 챔파그니 트라i넬에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Marigny nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Marigny-le-Châtel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Marigny II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelis, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Garnier II de Trainel. Ela faleceu após 1175, em Traînel, Champagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Marigny родилась около 1135 г. в местности маригни-ле-чaтел, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Marigny II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelis, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Garnier II de Trainel. Она умерла после 1175 г. в местности траiнель, чампагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Marigny nació aproximadamente 1135, en Marigny-le-Châtel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Marigny II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelis, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Garnier II de Trainel. Murió después de 1175, en Traînel, Champagne, Francia.
